title: selliguea griffithiana
intro: Selliguea griffithiana, also known as the Selaginella, is a type of tropical spore-bearing plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea griffithiana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in infusions, decoctions, or made into capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
